headline: A product-focused profile that is clean and concrete.

sections.title: Who I am
sections.body: I am Faniry Ranaivoson, a passionate and hardworking software engineer, combining a constant technical curiosity with rigorous execution.

sections.title: My value and mindset
sections.body: I like to understand how systems work, whether at the architectural or implementation level.However, I believe a great application must also be visually compelling; I pair technical performance with clean, attractive design to build software that is as engaging as it is reliable.

sections.title: What I am looking for
sections.body: With first experience gained through a few professional freelance projects, I am now looking for an internship or a first role to keep learning, contribute to real products, and grow in a demanding environment.

sections.title: 'From the creative side'
sections.body: Outside of code, I enjoy illustration, creative projects, and ideas that mix technology, design, and meaning.
